name: OpenAI Brand Impersonation Credential Phishing
description: Scammer impersonating an OpenAI researcher on Upwork to collect government ID and credentials via a fake contractor portal

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: I am an AI researcher at OpenAI and I need your help with a confidential model evaluation project paying $200/hour.

conversation.speaker: target
conversation.message: That sounds interesting. What is the process to apply?

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: Visit openai-contractor-verify.com/apply and submit your LinkedIn, GitHub, and government-issued ID to verify your eligibility.

red_flags: High hourly rate AI project bait
